title: The Toronto Star
content:
...The poetry is fine... rewarding reading...
    Almost every poem in Sympathetic Magic
    boasts an admirable image or two.
    Brown can write, without a doubt.
meaning:
"The Toronto Star" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
